name: Tag
structurePatterns: Default tag: inline-flex pill with optional icon prefix and close suffix
Status tag (L1): filled background + colored border + optional icon, strongest weight
Status tag (L2): transparent background + colored border, medium weight
Status tag (L3): no border/background, text-only with optional rounded bg variant
Multi-color tag: same structure as default but uses semantic color tokens
Digital tag: numeric-focused with Roboto font, rect or circle border-radius
Add tag: dashed border with plus icon, acts as a trigger
usageHints: Default tag sizes: lg=24px, default=20px, sm=18px, mini=16px height
Tag fill bg: var(--color-bg-5), text: var(--color-text-2)
Tag border: 1px solid var(--color-border), transparent bg
Status L1 success: bg var(--success-1), color var(--success-5), border var(--success-3)
Status L2: transparent bg with colored border only
Status L3: text-only; rounded variant adds tinted background
Multi-color fill primary: bg var(--color-tag-info-bg), color var(--color-primary)
Digital tag uses font-family Roboto, font-weight 700, letter-spacing 0.5px
Add tag: dashed border via border: 1px dashed var(--color-border)
Close icon: 12x12px, opacity 0.6 default, 1.0 on hover

root.class: tag tag-{type} tag-{size} | status-tag status-tag-{size} status-tag-{level} status-tag-{variant} | dtag dtag-{size} dtag-{shape} dtag-{style} dtag-{color} | atag atag-{size}
